test-case.description: registers users and routing-queues datasets

test-case.description: runs users dataset with nextUri paging and normalized output

test-case.description: runs routing-queues dataset and normalizes records
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.runs routing-queues dataset and normalizes records

test-case.description: runs catalog-defined dataset that is not explicitly registered
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.runs catalog-defined dataset that is not explicitly registered

test-case.description: applies endpoint defaultQueryParams to route and query values for generic datasets

test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.applies DatasetParameters.Query overrides for generic datasets

test-case.description: redacts sensitive headers and query parameters in request events
test-case.name: Request logging redaction.redacts sensitive headers and query parameters in request events

test-case.description: redacts embedded bearer and query token strings while preserving non-sensitive text
test-case.name: Record payload redaction hardening.redacts embedded bearer and query token strings while preserving non-sensitive text

test-case.description: enumerates nextUri pages and terminates when nextUri is empty
test-case.name: Paging strategies.enumerates nextUri pages and terminates when nextUri is empty

test-case.description: resolves relative nextUri values to absolute URIs
test-case.name: Paging strategies.resolves relative nextUri values to absolute URIs

test-case.description: enumerates pageNumber pages and stops when totalHits reached
test-case.name: Paging strategies.enumerates pageNumber pages and stops when totalHits reached

test-case.description: terminates pageNumber when empty page is returned
test-case.name: Paging strategies.terminates pageNumber when empty page is returned

test-case.description: enumerates cursor pages and terminates when cursor is missing
test-case.name: Paging strategies.enumerates cursor pages and terminates when cursor is missing

test-case.description: enumerates bodyPaging pages and stops when totalHits reached
test-case.name: Paging strategies.enumerates bodyPaging pages and stops when totalHits reached

test-case.description: treats itemsPath $ as a single response item
test-case.name: Paging strategies.treats itemsPath $ as a single response item

test-case.description: treats itemsPath $. as a single response item
test-case.name: Paging strategies.treats itemsPath $. as a single response item

test-case.description: uses explicit RetryProfile parameter over EndpointSpec.retry
test-case.name: Paging strategies.uses explicit RetryProfile parameter over EndpointSpec.retry

test-case.description: terminates pageNumber_default paging when pageCount is reached
test-case.name: Paging strategies.terminates pageNumber_default paging when pageCount is reached

test-case.description: terminates nextUri_default paging when nextUri is null
test-case.name: Paging strategies.terminates nextUri_default paging when nextUri is null

test-case.description: runs analytics-style async profile with custom id/state paths

test-case.description: uses configured terminalStates fallback when terminalStatesPath is missing in status payload
test-case.name: Async job engine.uses configured terminalStates fallback when terminalStatesPath is missing in status payload

test-case.description: handles transient retries + paging + async polling in one flow
test-case.name: Async job engine.handles transient retries + paging + async polling in one flow

test-case.description: runs submit->poll->results flow with cursor paging and writes outputs

test-case.description: fails when analytics job reaches FAILED terminal state
